reviews.comment:
Recuerdos de mi niñez, siempre parábamos en esa Estación de Servicio en la antigua Ruta 9.  A la mitad de camino, más o menos entre Córdoba y Buenos Aires. Con camping incluído.

(Translated by Google)
Memories of my childhood, we always stopped at that gas station on the old Route 9. About halfway between Córdoba and Buenos Aires. With camping included.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5c3YyZ0pREAE

reviews.comment:
Es una opción, pero tenés el camino muy roto al salir de la autopista

(Translated by Google)
It's an option, but you have a very broken road when you leave the highway.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5OEpIR2JREAE

reviews.comment:
Este ACA es ideal para parar a comer en las mesitas al aire libre, o simplemente mover las piernas. Tiene mucho campo, es tranquilo y suele haber poca gente. Tiene para comprar comida, o tomar cafe e incluso algunas hamacas para los.mas chicos. Los baños suelen estar algo desprolijo pero siempre hay papel y jabón.

(Translated by Google)
This ACA is ideal for stopping for a meal at the outdoor tables, or simply for stretching your legs. It has plenty of open space, is peaceful, and is usually uncrowded. You can buy food, get coffee, and even find some hammocks for children. The restrooms are often a bit shabby, but there's always toilet paper and soap.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTX19YNXR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Sobre la antigua Ruta Nacional 9. Quedó alejada de la moderna Autopista Córdoba Rosario. Pero no deja de ser un lugar para hacer un alto, con una arboleda con mesa y bancos para merendar. No dejo de ir, me recuerda tiempos adolescentes.

(Translated by Google)
Located on the old National Route 9, it's far from the modern Córdoba-Rosario Highway. But it's still a great place to stop, with a grove of trees and a picnic table and benches. I keep going back; it reminds me of my teenage years.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTcjVDN1JnEAE
